title: ExtraOrdinary
description: Just another resource pack with tweaks to vanilla textures.
body:
This pack changes a few textures that were not updated in the texture update or I want to make other changes to.

Texture Showcase:
(Not all textures in the pack are shown)

![Textures 1](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/4P9l1tpR/images/864eebf899227eed6f88b0d8a0bc7efa11c13447.png)

![Textures 2](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/4P9l1tpR/images/c64e6a8b7b1be65a017c0e6e9c787fc55b06f30c.png)

![Textures 3](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/4P9l1tpR/images/5739036e5e7035815bd85b534f3249834fa21321.png)

![Textures 4](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/4P9l1tpR/images/bcea66ea1d584be02a20cb5c03bd18379729d119.png)


You can use this pack in your modpack, video, etc. as long as you credit me and do not change the pack at all.

[CurseForge Download](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/extraordinary/)
